---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for CadenceSync
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g. "I find it annoying when...")
**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen and how you imagine it working.
**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.
**Additional context**
Add any other context, mockup screenshots, or design suggestions about the feature request here.
